Container.Name: gridmind-backend
Container.Overview: GridMind Backend — AI-powered solar battery optimiser. Manages scheduling, Octopus Energy pricing, Home Assistant integration, and InfluxDB logging. Connects to your existing MariaDB and InfluxDB instances. All runtime settings are configured via the web UI after first launch.
Container.Requires: Existing MariaDB 10.11+ instance with a 'gridmind' database and user. Existing InfluxDB 2.x instance (connection configured via the GridMind UI). Both must be on the 192.168.1.0/24 subnet. Container must be placed on br0 with static IP 192.168.1.75.

Config.Name: DB Host
Config.Description: IP or hostname of your existing MariaDB instance.

Config.Name: DB Name
Config.Description: Database name. Must exist before first start — GridMind will run migrations automatically.

Config.Name: DB Password
Config.Description: Database password. Must match the password used when creating the MariaDB user.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Logging verbosity: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, or ERROR.
